decisions.rationale: mapJournalEntriesRow hardcodes has_ai_reflection: false so the ai_RNbBHXjK–jM reflection badge subtree stays hidden until live ai_reflection_text data exists. JOURNAL-02 scope is read-only list fetch with mood_tag_text badges; AC-2 names title_text, mood_tag_text, and content preview only. AI reflection fetch, generate-reflection-btn, and ai_RNbBHXlP rendering are explicitly scoped to JOURNAL-04-entry-detail-and-ai-reflection (AC-3, journalReflectionApi.ts). criteria_audit and ui_evidence pass for card template and reflection indicator DOM; JOURNAL-03 depends_on gate does not require reflection data on list rows.

Empty-state card inside ai_RNbBHXiu deliberately omits IR bubble anchors after C-1 rewrite removed duplicate data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXir from the empty-state CTA. JOURNAL-02 decompose ui_refs do not name a distinct empty-state entity; layout_notes and AC-1 cover actions row and grid/card template only. Brownfield dashed-border UX is an intentional SPA enhancement that does not fail criteria_audit or ui_evidence (all named ui_refs pass). Inventory lookup for a dedicated empty-state id can wait for a future wave if IR documents one.

JOURNAL-02 AC-3 requires new-entry-btn and journal-view-entry-btn to emit open-popup callbacks wired in later items — not to mount Bubble popups now. criteria_audit AC-3 and functional_audit FV-2/FV-3 pass: JournalEntriesTab callbacks connect to Journal.tsx openNew/openEdit and functional CRUD via brownfield Dialog works as interim host. Popup IR migration to ai_RNbBHXkK (new-entry-popup) and ai_RNbBHXkh (entry-detail-popup) is explicitly assigned to JOURNAL-03-new-entry-popup and JOURNAL-04-entry-detail-and-ai-reflection per decompose; both list JOURNAL-02 in depends_on and can replace Dialog on their implement turns without blocking this item's gate.

summary: Post-rewrite review passed at 100% coverage with 0 blockers; prior C-1 duplicate ai_RNbBHXir resolved. Triage: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Deferred: C-1 → JOURNAL-04-entry-detail-and-ai-reflection (has_ai_reflection from ai_reflection_text); C-3 → JOURNAL-03-new-entry-popup / JOURNAL-04-entry-detail-and-ai-reflection (replace Dialog with IR popups). Accepted: C-2 (intentional empty-state UX without IR bubble anchor after duplicate-id fix). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
